channel.title: MBallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MBallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: SCOTUS Shuts Down New York’s Bid To Redistrict GOP Seat Ahead Of 2026 Midterms
item.description: The New York court's order 'is unadorned racial discrimination' wrote Justice Samuel Alito.

item.title: After briefing, lawmakers disagree on whether Iran threat to U.S. was imminent
item.description: Republicans and Democrats remain split on whether Congress needs to authorize President Trump's military operation in Iran, after an initial classifie...

item.title: Senate test vote on bipartisan housing package succeeds
item.description: The Senate on Monday approved a procedural test vote needed to begin debate on bipartisan legislation designed to expand housing supply and lower the ...

item.title: Nancy Mace faces House ethics committee investigation
item.description: Rep. Nancy Mace is under investigation by the House ethics committee after the Office of Congressional Conduct found "substantial reason to believe" t...

item.title: SCOTUS Blocks California School Policy Hiding Kids’ ‘Gender Presentation’ From Parents
item.description: The high court vacated an appeals court ruling allowing California schools to hide kids' 'gender presentation' from their parents.

item.title: DOJ drops attempt to punish Democrat-connected law firms
item.description: The Justice Department told a federal appeals court on Monday that it was dropping a host of appeals challenging lower court rulings that had blocked ...

item.title: Supreme Court: California parents have a right to know whether child is transitioning in school
item.description: The Supreme Court sided with parents Monday in a legal fight over California's requirement public school teachers keep gender transitions secret from ...

item.title: Texas Fire Chaplain Fired After Saying Men Don’t Belong In Women’s Sports Scores $78K Settlement
item.description: 'Cases like this demonstrate that when you stand up, when you fight for the First Amendment, that cities don't get away with this sort of thing.'

item.title: The New Machine Gets Its Spoils
item.description: Zohran Mamdani’s choice for a key foreign policy position in his administration shows the power of a progressive Tammany Hall.

item.title: You Don’t Hate Media Enough: NYT, WaPo Remember Ayatollah As ‘Cleric’ With ‘Easy Smile’
item.description: If you thought The Washington Post’s infamous decision to describe ISIS leader Abu Bakr al-Baghdadi as an “austere religious scholar” was a once in a ...

item.title: Over Iran, U.S. and Israeli Aircraft Fly as Equals
item.description: Israel has emerged as the Middle East’s preeminent military power just as the U.S. seeks to reduce its permanent footprint in the region.

item.title: No, Mr. President, Section 122 Tariffs Won’t Work Either
item.description: Despite Donald Trump’s claims, history shows that Section 122 does not justify his new tariffs.

item.title: Iran’s Last-Stand Strategy
item.description: The regime’s armed forces are mounting the very offensive that was expected to accompany the theocracy’s final moments.

item.title: The Epstein Panic
item.description: There’s a reason that it is not the usual practice of the DOJ to release unverified, disparaging information about people it’s not charging with crime...

item.title: Mamdani Says Quiet Part Out Loud About Democrats’ Tax-Hiking Agenda
item.description: Elected Democrats rarely limit tax increases to wealthy families once in office.
